narrative:
Springfield City Sd city school district has 28,149 registered voters, with 63.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.2 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.1% D−R vs +11.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
